input_template.pageFunction: async function pageFunction({page, request}){const dom=await page.content();const crypto=require('crypto');const hash=crypto.createHash('sha256').update(dom).digest('hex');const scripts=await page.$$eval('script[src]',ss=>ss.map(s=>s.src));const externalScripts=scripts.filter(s=>!s.includes('creditaccessgrameen.in'));const title=await page.title();return{url:request.url,dom_hash:hash,title,external_scripts:externalScripts,captured_at:new Date().toISOString()};}
